headline: ECB President Signals Cautious Rate Cut Approach in Spring
analysis: ECB maintaining dovish bias for Q1 2026, markets expect 25bp cut in March. Supports EUR weakness vs USD, positive for peripheral bonds (Italian BTP spreads narrow).

headline: Fed Signals Steady Rates Through Q1 2026 Amid Inflation Concerns
analysis: Fed officials express confidence in inflation trajectory, declining to commit to rate cuts before April. USD strength accelerates, 10Y yields hold at 4.1%. Positive for financials, pressure on growth stocks.

headline: Nvidia Q4 2025 Earnings Beat, Guides Higher on AI Demand
analysis: NVDA reports $38.7B revenue (+65% YoY), FY2026 guidance $42B+ (vs consensus $40B). AI data center demand remains robust, margins expand. Semiconductor sector rallies, NASDAQ +1.2%.

headline: Gold Breaks Above $2,180/oz on USD Weakness Concerns
analysis: Gold extends rally as real yields compress and geopolitical tensions in Asia resurface. Safe-haven flows accelerate. GLD options vol spike to 18%.

headline: Bitcoin Reaches $68,500 as Spot ETF Inflows Resume
analysis: BTC rallies on institutional buying via spot ETFs, weekly inflows surpass $2.2B. Options market pricing 7% upside by month-end. Ethereum follows at $3,850.

headline: European Auto Sector Rebounds on EV Subsidies Extension
analysis: EU extends EV purchase subsidies through 2027 amid weak Q4 2025 sales. BMW, Daimler +2.5%, VW +1.8%. CAC 40 components outperform DAX.

headline: UK Inflation Cools to 2.1% YoY, Exceeds BoE Expectations
analysis: CPI decline supports GBP strength vs EUR. BoE May cut odds increase to 65%. 10Y Gilts fall 8bp to 3.85%.

headline: China Manufacturing PMI Contracts to 48.2, Missing Forecast
analysis: Caixin PMI signals contraction for 2nd straight month. Iron ore prices fall 3%, copper pressured. Slowdown in export demand signals weak Q1 GDP. Hang Seng -1.8%.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway Q4 Earnings: Record Buybacks, Increased Cash Position
analysis: BRK.B reports $176B buyback activity in 2025, cash position at $157B. Buffett signals cautious outlook on valuations. Markets interpret as sideways sentiment.

headline: Oil Prices Rally on OPEC+ Supply Cuts, Reach $78/bbl
analysis: WTI crude rallies as OPEC extends 2M barrel/day cuts through Q2 2026. Geopolitical risk premium increases. Energy stocks outperform, XLE +1.5%.
